+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "surrealdb-2750-bug-abnormal-memory-usage",
+  "missionClass": "fixer",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "surrealdb: Bug: Abnormal memory usage",
+    "description": "Bug: Abnormal memory usage. This issue affects 10+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify surrealdb troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your surrealdb installation:\n```bash\nsurreal version\nsurreal is-ready\n```\nLook for errors or warnings that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review surrealdb configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant surrealdb configuration:\n### Describe the bug\n\nI fill SurrealDB with nearly 4 millions of documents with storage TiKV\nEach documents is like that : \n```\n{\n    \"ActivityType\": \"playing\",\n    \"Application\": \"Diablo 4648\",\n    \"DateEnd\": \"2022-03-25T0409.535708500Z\",\n   "
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Bug: Abnormal memory usage",
+        "description": "Thank you for submitting this pull request! We appreciate you spending the time to work on these changes.\n\n## What is the motivation?\n\nSolve a memory leak that caused the server to get slower and slower, while memory usage would grow and grow.\n\nThe callback that was registered for the\n```yaml\n{\n    \"ActivityType\": \"playing\",\n    \"Application\": \"Diablo 4648\",\n    \"DateEnd\": \"2022-03-25T04:53:09.535708500Z\",\n    \"DateStart\": \"2022-03-25T02:38:09.535708500Z\",\n    \"Details\": \"Barbarian 4648\",\n    \"State\": \"Level 4648\",\n    \"Username\": \"toto-4648\",\n    \"id\": \"activity:000044n6y109yktjlacu\"\n}\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Bug: Abnormal memory usage is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\nTest surrealdb to confirm the issue is resolved.\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Thank you for submitting this pull request! We appreciate you spending the time to work on these changes.\n\n## What is the motivation?\n\nSolve a memory leak that caused the server to get slower and slower, while memory usage would grow and grow.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "{\n    \"ActivityType\": \"playing\",\n    \"Application\": \"Diablo 4648\",\n    \"DateEnd\": \"2022-03-25T04:53:09.535708500Z\",\n    \"DateStart\": \"2022-03-25T02:38:09.535708500Z\",\n    \"Details\": \"Barbarian 4648\",\n    \"State\": \"Level 4648\",\n    \"Username\": \"toto-4648\",\n    \"id\": \"activity:000044n6y109yktjlacu\"\n}",
+        "select count() from activity group all;",
+        "{\n    \"ActivityType\": \"playing\",\n    \"Application\": \"Diablo 4648\",\n    \"DateEnd\": \"2022-03-25T04:53:09.535708500Z\",\n    \"DateStart\": \"2022-03-25T02:38:09.535708500Z\",\n    \"Details\": \"Barbarian 4648\",\n    \"State\": \"Level 4648\",\n    \"Username\": \"toto-4648\",\n    \"id\": \"activity:000044n6y109yktjlacu\"\n}"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "surrealdb",
+      "community",
+      "multi-model-db",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "surrealdb"
+    ],

+      "troubleshoot"

+      "pr": "https://github.com/surrealdb/surrealdb/pull/2771"
+    },
+    "reactions": 10,

+  },

+      "surreal"
+    ],

+  },
